item.title: Implementation of PLA
item.author: Author
item.description: In this article, I would show the by-hand implementation of PLA. I won’t get into the detail of the algorithm, but just help someone wants some practical experience. Also, I recommend everyone to implement it because only do it will you find the points you still not figure out about it. Dataset Here we have ten training sets and one test set. In datasets, we have two features and classification results in (0, 1).
